calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-037 broadcast override 4-arm: bistable (Bug 1 fix)
items.notes: Corrected rerun: Bug 1 BreathOscillator disabled (breath_period=0). Bug 2 does not apply (bistable path).

items.title: SD-049 Phase 2 reef behavioural validation, sleep-on ablation (paired to 514f)
items.notes: Sleep-on ablation paired to V3-EXQ-514f (FAIL 2026-05-08T04:32Z: classifier diverges + probe_acc_neighborhood<=0.564 across all reef arms). 3 arms x 3 seeds: ARM_0_off (sleep OFF, replicates 514f baseline), ARM_1_sd017_only (manual run_sleep_cycle between episodes), ARM_2_phase_a (use_sleep_loop=True K=3). Tests whether SD-017 SWS+REM consolidation recovers SD-049 / SD-015 identity discrimination. Lit anchor: Lansink 2009 SWR replay + Stickgold 2013 + Walker 2017 REM generalisation. Substrate landed 2026-04-25 (Sleep Phases A-E) but no waking evidence-class experiment has used it. Dry-run PASS: ARM_1 sws=24/rem=24, ARM_2 sws=4/rem=4, ARM_0 zero (semantic check confirmed). Priority 8: below EXQ-537 (priority 10) so 537 runs first. Queued 2026-05-08T04:58Z; do not run until user confirms scope.
